sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-region detector for valid-padding 3D convolution windows.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_pack: Combinational 3D window forwarding and packing boundary between buffering and compute.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate engine over the flattened K1 by K2 by K3 window and kernel.
sub_modules.conv3d_output_format: Combinational output-width formatter that truncates the accumulator to the required voxel output width.
sub_modules.conv3d_done_ctrl: Combinational end-of-volume done flag generation from valid_in and last_in.
